Wrapped XRP (wXRP) Launches on Solana** | **NO** | **HIGH** confidence[1][2]

Wrapped XRP went live on Solana as of April 19, enabling XRP access to Solana's DeFi ecosystem, but prediction markets show **no price reaction** with Solana's $150 target (April 13-19) at 0% YES and XRP's April 19 market flat at near-zero odds[1][2].
